title: Bazi Personal Tarot Card AI
sourceTitle: Bazi Personal Tarot Card AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Vertical ornate personal tarot card inspired by Bazi. Central elegant figure, symbolic border, gold foil details. English labels: Bazi Archetype, Element, Main Fortune, Hidden Strength, Guidance, Lucky Symbol. Title ribbon: The Wood Star. English-only visible text. No Chinese characters anywhere. Clean readable English labels. No watermarks, no fake platform logos, no unreadable pseudo text. variant focus: Bazi Personal Tarot Card V1. visible text language: English only.
